productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Solid Green Jacket
description: Composition Green front zippered jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock collar and full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sleeves in white, two zippered pockets on the sides, brand logo printed on left chest and ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash inside out at 40 degrees with fastners closed and like colours Do not tumble dry Dry inside out Cool iron Sporty, cool and your best friend when it's a little chilly, this green jacket from adidas belongs in your wardrobe. Wear this jacket to college, for a biking trip or to office - basically wear it anywhere! The jacket is not just practical, the vibrant colour also adds to your style. Pair it with jeans and casual shoes for a chilled out look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
